title: karvandarina cartilaginea
intro: Karvandarina cartilaginea, also known as bonebreaker or cartilage breaker, is a plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae and is native to the mountainous regions of Iran. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which make it beneficial for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Karvandarina cartilaginea include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, decoction, or dried powder, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
